prompt.description: Text prompt describing the video scene. Use 'Image 1', 'Image 2' to reference images and 'Video 1', 'Video 2' to reference videos in order of the media arrays. Up to 5000 characters.
prompt.title: Prompt

negative_prompt.description: Content to exclude from the video. Up to 500 characters.
negative_prompt.title: Negative Prompt

reference_images.description: Reference images for characters/objects/scenes. Each must contain a single subject. Images + videos <= 5 total.
reference_images.title: Reference Images

reference_videos.description: Reference videos for characters and voice timbre. MP4/MOV, 1-30s, up to 100MB each. Avoid empty-scene videos.
reference_videos.title: Reference Videos

first_frame.description: First frame image for precise scene composition. Max 1.
first_frame.title: First Frame

reference_voice.description: Audio for voice timbre reference. WAV/MP3, 1-10s, up to 15MB. Overrides reference video audio.
reference_voice.title: Reference Voice

ratio.description: Aspect ratio. Ignored if first_frame is provided (uses frame ratio instead).

duration.description: Video duration in seconds. 2-10 if reference videos provided, 2-15 otherwise.
duration.title: Duration

prompt_extend.description: Enable prompt rewriting via LLM for better results.
prompt_extend.title: Prompt Extend

watermark.description: Add 'AI Generated' watermark to bottom-right corner.
watermark.title: Watermark
